message:
style(connectors): rustfmt normalization across AWS, Cloudflare, DockerHub, GCP, Netlify, PayPal, Shopify, and Supabase connectors

Automated rustfmt formatting pass across connector source files:

- Normalize require_str() helper indentation in AWS, Cloudflare,
  DockerHub, GCP, Netlify, PayPal, Shopify, and Supabase connectors
  to match the canonical rustfmt chain-call alignment style.

- Reflow long lines in hint() closures, operations_info() builders,
  assert macros, and function signatures to stay within rustfmt limits.

- Minor import reordering to match alphabetical convention.

No functional changes — pure formatting normalization for consistency
across the connector codebase.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
